actions.intent: Take the visually easy high puppy first instead of respecting the buried lower target.
Spend the next action around the upper board rather than immediately pivoting lower.
Keep playing the open top-side lane after the tempting puppy is already saved.
Overflow the dock with broad top-side residue before the lower puppy is secure.

notes: Verified false-easy fail: the high target is rescued first, then top-side cleanup produces dock overflow while the buried lower puppy remains trapped.
